## Summary

## Public API Impact

- [ ] No public API changes
- [ ] Public API changes are documented
- [ ] Breaking changes are listed in `CHANGELOG.md`

## Tests

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `staticcheck ./...`
- [ ] `govulncheck ./...`
- [ ] Benchmark smoke or benchmark results, if performance-sensitive

## Compatibility

- [ ] Go 1.20 compatibility preserved
- [ ] External import behavior considered
- [ ] Release notes updated when user-visible behavior changes
